name: 发放幸运币
description: 战斗开始时，该阵营玩家获得一张幸运币手牌
code: function executeSkill(context) { try { console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] context.playerId:', context.playerId); var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId.toLowerCase() === context.playerId.toLowerCase(); }); if (!player) { console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] Player not found'); return { success: false, message: 'Player not found' }; } console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] Found player:', player.playerId); var result = addCardToHand('lucky-coin', player.playerId); console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] addCardToHand result:', result); return { success: result, message: (player.name || player.playerId) + ' 获得了幸运币' }; } catch (e) { console.error('[grant-lucky-coin] Error:', e); return { success: false, message: 'Error: ' + e.message }; } }
